name: Kona Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a greased 13x9 inch pan.
2. In a large bowl, cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. Stir in the mashed bananas until combined.
5. Sift together the flour, baking soda, and salt; add to the banana mixture alternately with milk, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients. Mix until just combined.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 35-40 minutes (or 325°F/165°C for 30 minutes if using a glass pan), or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing and transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
This recipe makes delicious muffins too, which can be baked for 25 minutes in muffin tins. Adding chocolate chips is recommended.
